name: callbell
description: Lazy senior mode for code and knowledge repos: adaptive skills, rules, and an always-on context loader.

interface.shortDescription: Lazy senior mode for code and knowledge repos
interface.longDescription: Forces the leanest solution that holds (YAGNI, reuse, the smallest correct form) for code and for filing and structure, and ships the review, audit, and debt tools plus onboarding.
defaultPrompt: Set up this project with callbell.
